Create Your Crest
Head office picks · Updated monthly

Twenty crests
we'd sign under.

Curated by our Franchise Director and brand team. Not the most-voted, not the newest — the ones we think could hold a territory.

Submit your crest →See the full gallery
01Curated
Joburg Sunset
Johannesburg · Thabo M.

Restraint. The cream inner wins it.

02Curated
Cape Storm
Cape Town · Nadia R.

A Cape Town brand could wear this honestly.

03Curated
Karoo Dust
Kimberley · Pieter v.

Regional palette, national confidence.

04Curated
Midlands Green
Pietermaritzburg · Zanele K.

Green that doesn't look like supermarket signage.

05Curated
Kalahari Noon
Upington · Anika P.

Dense, earthy — reads on a 40sqm counter.

06Curated
Sandton Gold
Sandton · Ricardo M.

Coastal without the cliché.

07Curated
Umgeni Teal
Durban · Precious D.

High-contrast. Works on a storefront at 40m.

08Curated
Garden Route
George · Elmarie S.

Serifs holding against a warm base.

09Curated
Summerset
Soweto · Kagiso M.

Gold on navy still wins. Always will.

10Curated
Stellenbosch Oak
Stellenbosch · Johan vZ.

Balanced. Ownable. Good.

Seasonal drop

Autumn Harvest
Autumn Harvest.

Four palettes rotate with the calendar. Every season brings new swatches to the Crest Creator. Current season runs Mar–May.

Summer Blaze
Dec–Feb
Autumn Harvest
Mar–May
Winter Frost
Jun–Aug
Spring Bloom
Sep–Nov
Papa Pasta

2 crew. 40sqm. 11-month payback. Fresh pasta QSR built for South African operators who want theatre, margin, and a crest of their own.
